dissent_flag.dissent_reason: Technical flagged a CHOP MIXED ribbon (39¢ spread, alternating bars with no directional momentum) disqualifying any directional bias; internals identified narrow breadth — only XLK leading (+0.55%) while XLF (−0.35%) and XLE (−0.19%) are weak, confirming mixed rather than clean risk-on rotation.

validator_assessment.weakest_link: Treating an overnight gap-down (−$2.34, already 50% retraced in premarket) as a persistent bearish signal when overnight gaps are typically 80% mean-reverted by 09:35 ET — the consensus bets on a 50/50 coin flip at 665.38 resistance without technical conviction.
validator_assessment.top_invalidation_scenario: XLK sustains +0.55% through RTH open and SPY breaks 665.38 on first 5-min bar with volume ≥5M and bullish close — would prove 665.38 resistance is not hard and flip consensus to secondary bullish scenario targeting 666.65.

battle_level.battle_grade_note: Premarket high tested in PM session only; RTH battle outcome unknown — abstain applies per v5 UNTESTED penalty

level_priority.note: Battle level — gap-up ceiling / first RTH overhead. Rejection here = bearish primary; break above = bullish secondary.
Very fresh (15-min-old) gap-down floor. 63¢ below current price — first intraday support if RTH opens weak.
Multi-session Carry resistance — target only if 665.38 breaks bullishly.
Gap-fill support shelf — activated only if 663.09 breaks and bears extend.
Deep Carry floor — awareness only unless a trending bear day develops. Not an intraday trigger candidate.

primary.condition: if SPY fails at 665.38 and holds 663.09 support on early RTH test
primary.entry_trigger: level_rejection at 665.38 + reclaim_attempt at 663.09 — wait for confirmed rejection bar on RTH 5m with close below 665.00

secondary.condition: if SPY breaks above 665.38 on RTH open with bullish 5m bar close and volume ≥5M
secondary.entry_trigger: level_reclaim at 665.38 + momentum continuation — confirmation requires close above 665.50 to avoid false break

invalidation.condition: VIX falls to 16.20 or below by 10:00 ET AND RTH open breadth expands to 3+ sectors green
invalidation.effect: Eliminates both pillars of the bearish thesis (gap sentiment + elevated uncertainty); the overnight gap reverts as expected, internals shift to risk-on, and the bearish consensus loses all structural support. Bullish secondary becomes primary.

swarm_predictions.claim: SPY tests the 665.38 PMH battle level (within 10¢) at some point during the first 90 minutes of RTH (by 11:00 ET)
swarm_predictions.invalidation: SPY does not reach 665.00 before 11:00 ET — gap-down sentiment dominates and price stays below the PM range high

swarm_predictions.claim: VIX falls to 16.20 or below by 10:00 ET as the overnight gap-down fear normalizes and buyers step in at 663.09 premarket low
swarm_predictions.invalidation: VIX holds above 16.50 at 10:00 ET, confirming sustained elevated risk sentiment rather than normal gap mean-reversion

swarm_predictions.claim: The MIXED ribbon resolves to a clean directional stack (spread ≥ 30¢, fast clearly above or below slow) within the first two RTH 5-min bars (by 09:40 ET)
swarm_predictions.invalidation: Ribbon spread remains under 20¢ at 09:40 ET, confirming persistent chop and no directional trade available for the first hour

synthesis_narrative: The key tension on 2025-10-01 is a 2-vs-2 specialist split: macro and level_thesis see a bearish setup (overnight gap-down, stacked resistances at 665.38→666.65→667.87) but technical reads pure chop (MIXED ribbon, alternating premarket bars) and internals shows only narrow tech leadership without broad confirmation. The weighted bearish score of 0.55 would produce a moderate bearish signal in a typical session, but with only 2 of 4 specialists aligned AND the battle level at 665.38 untested in RTH, the v5 confidence formula produces a raw score of 3 (well below the 40-point NO_TRADE threshold) — the swarm correctly abstains. The single most important thing to watch at market open is the first 5-min bar's relationship to 665.38: a bullish break with volume ≥5M flips the entire setup to the secondary bullish scenario; a rejection with a red close activates the primary bearish path toward 661.82.

technical.one_line: CHOP ribbon (MIXED, 39¢ spread, fast≈pivot) with alternating PM bars — no directional conviction, disqualified from providing directional signal

macro.one_line: Gap-down −$2.34 overnight + VIX rising to 16.78 MID regime with zero macro events today — slightly bearish backdrop offset by risk-on sector rotation signal

level_thesis.one_line: Battle level 665.38 (PMH) as RTH-untested resistance with stacked supply above; asymmetric downside if 665.38 holds — primary target 661.82 via 663.09

internals.one_line: Divergent rotation: XLK +0.55% (narrow tech leadership) vs XLF −0.35% / XLE −0.19% (finance/energy weak) — NOT risk-on, insufficient breadth for directional confirmation

validator.top_invalidation: XLK sustaining +0.55%+ forces SPY above 665.38 at RTH open, triggering the secondary bullish scenario the bearish consensus defined but underweighted
